# Strange Harvest (2025)

> Strange Harvest is a horror mockumentary film following detectives investigating the ritualistic murders of the serial killer known as Mr. Shiny. Directed by Stuart Ortiz. Streaming now on Hulu (US) and Paramount+ (Canada).

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://strangeharvestmovie.com/
- Spanish version: https://strangeharvestmovie.com/es
- Privacy Policy: https://strangeharvestmovie.com/privacy.html

## Streaming

- Hulu (US): https://www.hulu.com/movie/strange-harvest-e931d642-fe34-4b92-b6da-96f4c7573fac
- Paramount+ (Canada): https://www.paramountplus.com/ca/movies/video/_rwhlpI_KPDSpgSqI41q70Q6VVwGC2lG/

## External References

- IMDb: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt33400719/
